# Copilot Instructions

- Build the Mumbai University SGPA Calculator as a production-ready Vite React app.
- Use reusable components, TailwindCSS, and JavaScript.
- Keep the UI modern, responsive, accessible, and visually polished.
- Support dark mode, light mode, validation, quick paste parsing, export, print, copy, share, and local save.
- Add and maintain unit tests for grading, parsing, validation, and SGPA calculations.
- Prefer small, focused edits and keep the codebase clean.
